creator: peter.thoenen@protonmail.com
text:
ALCON: Hold a sec please.  I will update security/tor once 
security/tor-devel with 1.2.14 have been approved and committed.  It has 
lots of good option features.  If you notice these PR have been there 
for awhile.

Nils: Next time try doing a PR search before creating duplicate PR's .. 
see http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=112492 .. your heart is 
in the right place though but I usually am a pretty active maintainer.

BF: Thank again for the patch. Was going to repo this over to 
security/tor once -devel was committed but I see Nils forced the issue. 
  All good though and thanks gain.

Martin: Please close PR 112492 as a duplicate of this and then I approve 
BF's patches for PR 113289 (this one) ... only diff is please drop me as 
maintainer of this per PR 112492.  I just don't use stable anymore ... 
BF, Nils, or anybody else feel free to pick it up.  Please hold on 
approving 11493 as I still regulary use -devel and want to test BF's 
patch first (the new one with the new tor branch).  I will most likely 
approve it though w/o modification .. will let you know Monday COB.

ALCON: As I said in 112492 I will continue to patch occasionally ad-hoc 
if nobody does and ports@ keeps it.
